# SHA-256 sums of the libkrun bottles ward consumes. Pinned locally even
# though the bottles are also published at igorjs/ward-vendor, so that a
# compromise of ward-vendor cannot inject a different binary into ward
# releases without an audit trail in this repo (this file diff in a PR).
#
# Bumping libkrun:
#   1. Update vendor/libkrun-version.txt
#   2. Trigger the build workflow at igorjs/ward-vendor with the new version
#   3. Copy the per-target SHA-256 sums from that workflow's release into
#      this file. The release packaging workflow (release.yml) refuses to
#      use any downloaded bottle whose hash isn't listed here.
#
# Format: <hex sha256>  libkrun-<version>-<target>.tar.gz
#
# Produced by ward-vendor run #26003889190 (commit cac844d), released as
# libkrun-v1.18.0 at https://github.com/igorjs/ward-vendor/releases/tag/libkrun-v1.18.0
b1c61501676e234763661b4980ca3f4d1e872fc136049e6b5ec9042f6753a719  libkrun-1.18.0-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
1977e74bb619d93bedb545652f216b544759722b04997fb408f899ab53e9d886  libkrun-1.18.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
65dc63f1858597b5e80fd42f08afb91d249b03a2abea3205dff61c1f39ac06fa  libkrun-1.18.0-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
